summary: Comprehensive testing of statistics visualizations feature on Florida stats and rehabs pages. All features working correctly: year dropdown selector (2019-2024), area charts, line charts, bar charts, pie/donut charts, substance statistics sections, and data methodology accordions.

success_rate.backend: 100% (API endpoints /api/statistics and /api/substance-statistics returning data for years 2019-2024)

seed_data_creation: Florida statistics data already seeded for years 2019-2024
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statistics visualizations feature fully tested. All charts (area, line, bar, pie/donut) render correctly. Year selector updates all statistics cards and charts. Data methodology accordions expand/collapse properly.

year_dropdown_selector.details: Shows all available years (Latest 2024, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019). Changing year updates statistics cards correctly - verified 2024 vs 2019 data differences.

statistics_cards.details: 4 main stat cards displayed: Total Affected (1.4M for 2024, 1.3M for 2019), Overdose Deaths (7K for 2024, 3K for 2019), Treatment Admissions (135K for 2024, 110K for 2019), Recovery Rate (42% for 2024, 43% for 2019)

people_affected_area_chart.details: Area chart 'People Affected Over Time in Florida' displays correctly with data from 2019-2024

overdose_opioid_line_chart.details: Line chart 'Overdose & Opioid Deaths in Florida' shows dual lines (yellow for Opioid Deaths, red for Overdose Deaths) from 2019-2024

age_group_pie_chart.details: Donut chart 'Affected by Age Group (2024)' displays with 4 age segments (12-17, 18-25, 26-34, 35+)

treatment_facilities_pie_chart.details: Donut chart 'Treatment Facilities (2024)' shows 810 Total Centers with Inpatient/Outpatient breakdown

economic_impact_bar_chart.details: Bar chart 'Economic Impact (Billions USD)' displays teal bars from 2019-2024

opioid_breakdown_section.details: Shows 4 stat cards: Rx Opioid Misuse (270K), Heroin Use (38K), Fentanyl Deaths (6K), Opioid Disorder (195K)

alcohol_statistics_section.details: Shows 4 stat cards: Past Month Use (57%), Binge Drinking (27.8%), Alcohol Use Disorder (1.0M), Related Deaths (5K)

stimulant_statistics_section.details: Shows Cocaine Use (190K), Cocaine Deaths (950), Meth Use (70K), Meth Deaths (350)

cannabis_statistics_section.details: Shows Past Month Use (2.1M), Use Disorder (310K)

treatment_access_gap_donut.details: Donut chart shows 'Received Treatment: 260K' and 'Needed, Not Received: 1.1M'

data_methodology_accordions.details: 4 accordion items present: Data Collection Process, Data Processing & Validation, Data Limitations & Considerations, Key Definitions. Expand/collapse working correctly.

official_data_sources.details: Shows 4 source cards: SAMHSA NSDUH, CDC WONDER, NIDA, TEDS with external links

florida_rehabs_statistics_tab.details: Statistics tab on /florida-addiction-rehabs page displays same statistics with year selector and all charts

api_statistics_endpoint.details: /api/statistics?state_id=FL returns 6 records for years 2019-2024 with all required fields

api_substance_statistics_endpoint.details: /api/substance-statistics?state_id=FL returns 6 records for years 2019-2024 with opioid, alcohol, stimulant, cannabis data
